$comment: KiKit panelization preset for slimsplaydy (JLCPCB PCBA). Runs on Hunter's machine (needs pcbnew). Source = slimsplaydy_both.kicad_pcb (built by merge_both.py): both halves nested side-by-side as two disjoint outlines, so one panel unit = one full keyboard (L+R). Modeled on LightFury's proven preset: FIXED tabs + full FRAME (KiKit 'spacing' tabs error on the irregular/splayed outlines; fixed tabs to the frame are reliable). See panel/README.md.
